title: Black Soap Dish for Bathroom - Suction Soap Holder with Drainage for Shower, Plastic Bar Soap Box Case Tray Saver, Draining Soap Dishes for Home Kitchen Toilet Product, No Drill & Glue, Removable
features: 【Premium Material & Powerful Suction】Our black soap dish is made of high-quality thickened industrial-grade ABS plastic, making it durable, waterproof, and oilproof. The suction cup of the soap dish is made of anti-ageing TPE material, which can hold up to 11 LBS and provides a sturdy bond for years. Additionally, if the surface you're mounting it on isn't suitable for suction cups, we've included an extra self-adhesive sticker for your peace of mind. This ensures it can meet all your needs.

【Unique Double Drainage Design】Our shower soap dish features a two-tier design. The top tier has deep grooves to ensure that soaps won't sit in water and will dry quickly, preventing them from becoming mushy.You can easily move the top layer for water drainage. This two-layer design makes using your soap much more convenient, and both cleaning and washing become much easier. Our soap saver is perfect for use in wet areas like bathrooms and kitchens.

【Removable & No Need for Drills or Glue】Simply attach the suction cup to the wall, press down on the soap holder's suction pad to expel air, and tighten the knob, the soap dish will then be firmly fixed to the wall. And our black soap holder is also easy to remove and reinstall in a new location for repeated use. Just unscrew the knob to remove the suction cup and wash it with warm water before reinstalling.

【Easy to Maintain & Keep Clean】Our shower suction cup soap holder has numerous integrated drainage holes to prevent water from pooling and to keep your soap dry. The high convex bars on the bottom of the soap dish will help soap dry faster and make it easy to pick up instead of having it soak in water and stick tightly to the bottom of the soap box holder.

【Reliable After-sales Service】Our soap tray adheres to smooth, non-porous surfaces such as metal, glass, tile, stainless steel, and acrylic. With the additional self-adhesive sticker, you can also mount it on uneven tiles, textured plates, unfinished marble, painted walls, etc. If you have any questions or needs, please feel free to contact us. We promise to provide wholehearted service until you are satisfied. We are dedicated to offering excellent home product to enhance your experience.
